cli.command.wizard.schema_long:
Embohasáke pe esquema ko'ãgagua launcher AnswerDocument ha esẽ.

Tembipuru agentic rehegua ojejapóva código hag̃ua, Codex ha Claude-icha, ohenói va'erã kóva raẽ ogueru hag̃ua pe contrato exacto launcher greentic-dev rehegua, oikehápe pehẽngue greentic-pack ha greentic-bundle answer schema ojeporúva delegación-pe.

runtime.passthrough.error.binary_not_fou: ndojuhúi `{name}` PATH-pe; emohenda {env_key}, emohenda `{name}` cargo binstall rupive, térã emongu'e `greentic-dev install tools` (`--latest` emombarete hag̃ua ñembopyahu)
runtime.tools.install.error.binstall_fai: `cargo binstall` ndoikói omboguejy hag̃ua {bin_name} (crate {crate_name}), osẽ hag̃ua código {exit_code}

runtime.wizard.confirm.error.non_interac: ojejoko ejecución modo jepokuaa'ỹvape confirmación'ỹre. Emongu'e jey `--execute --yes` térã `--execute --non-interactive` ndive.
